noPublicProfile: You haven't set up a public profile yet.

domainGate.title: Verify a domain first
domainGate.desc: This service needs at least one verified domain. Add and verify a domain to start sending and receiving mail.

store.confirmInstallDesc: This app will be added to your Sentroy OS.
store.confirmRemoveDesc: It will be removed from your Sentroy OS. You can reinstall it anytime.
store.installToReview: Install the app to leave a review.
store.consentDesc: This app will be able to access:

devConsole.title: App Store
devConsole.subtitle: Submit and manage your apps on the Sentroy App Store.
devConsole.dialogDesc: Paste your <id>.sentroy-app.json. It's validated on submit. Updates must bump identity.version.
devConsole.reviewHint: Submit for review → published to the public App Store after approval.
devConsole.privateHint: Save (company-only) → live immediately, visible only to your company's members (no review).
devConsole.noAccessDesc: You need the App Store permission to manage this company's apps.
devConsole.emptyDesc: Submit your first app to publish it on the Sentroy App Store.
devConsole.confirmDeleteDesc: This permanently removes the app and its installs. This can't be undone.
devConsole.confirmUnpublishDesc: It's removed from the public App Store, but existing installs keep working. You can resubmit later.
devConsole.verifyTitle: Verify your origin to be approved
devConsole.verifyServe: Serve {path} at {origin} containing this token (or add it as a DNS TXT record):
devConsole.savedPrivate: Saved — visible to your company only

welcomeSubtitle: Open an app from the dock below.

createCompanyDialog.title: Create workspace
createCompanyDialog.desc: Spin up a new workspace. You can invite members later.

profilePane.title: Profile
profilePane.name: Name
profilePane.headline: Headline
profilePane.handleInvalid: Only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens
profilePane.socialLinksDesc: Links shown on your public profile
profilePane.revokeConfirmDesc: This device will be signed out immediately.

companyPane.title: Company
companyPane.forbidden: You need owner or admin access to manage company settings.
companyPane.name: Name
companyPane.slugInvalid: Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only
companyPane.deleteDesc: Permanently delete this company and all its data
companyPane.deleteDialogDesc: This permanently deletes the company, its buckets, media and mail. This cannot be undone. Type {slug} to confirm.

billingPane.title: Billing
billingPane.notConfigured: Billing isn't configured for this plan yet.

notes.noSelection: Select a note or create a new one
notes.placeholder: Start writing… type @ to mention someone or an app
notes.deleteFolderConfirm: Delete this folder? Its notes move to All Notes.

firstRun.welcomeSubtitle: Create your first workspace to get started.

clock.title: Clock
clock.description: Time and date at a glance.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.description: Onboarding progress and your next steps.

mail-inbox.title: Mail — Recent inbox
mail-inbox.description: Latest messages from a mailbox of your choice.

storage-quick.title: Storage — Quick access
storage-quick.description: Shortcuts into a bucket and its folders.

linear-requests.title: Linear — Requests
linear-requests.description: Open request count from your panel inbox.

crypto-single.title: Crypto — Price
crypto-single.description: Live price and 24h change for one pair.

crypto-table.title: Crypto — Watchlist
crypto-table.description: Live prices and 24h change for several pairs.

crypto.disclaimer: Prices from Bitget. Not investment advice.

window.subtitle: Explore Sentroy and check things off as you go.

tips.invite-teammate: Open Settings → Team to add members or send an email invite. Members you invite share this workspace.
tips.create-access-token: Settings → Access tokens mints an stk_ token for the SDK and API. The plaintext token is shown only once — copy it.
tips.set-company-logo: Settings → Company lets you upload a logo. It appears in the team switcher and on your company profile.
tips.first-post: Open the Activity panel (click your company in the menu bar) and post an update to your company feed.
tips.first-note: The Notes app keeps quick notes you can pin to the desktop as sticky widgets.
tips.explore-tools: Open Tools from the dock — free image, PDF, audio, video and developer tools, no account data required.
tips.pin-tool-to-dock: Right-click any app or tool in the dock and choose Pin to keep it one click away.

invite-teammate.label: Invite a teammate
invite-teammate.description: Add a member or send an invite from Settings → Team.

create-access-token.label: Create an access token
create-access-token.description: Mint an API token for the SDK in Settings → Access tokens.

set-company-logo.label: Set your company logo
set-company-logo.description: Upload a logo in Settings → Company.

first-post.label: Share your first post
first-post.description: Post an update to your company feed.

first-note.label: Write your first note
first-note.description: Capture something in the Notes app.

explore-tools.label: Explore the free tools
explore-tools.description: Open Tools or Launchpad to browse the built-in utilities.

pin-tool-to-dock.label: Pin a tool to your dock
pin-tool-to-dock.description: Right-click an app or tool in the dock and pin it.

register-domain.label: Add a domain
register-domain.description: Register a sending domain in Mail.

verify-domain.label: Verify a domain
verify-domain.description: Complete the DNS setup so a domain turns active.

create-mailbox.label: Create a mailbox
create-mailbox.description: Set up your first mailbox on a verified domain.

send-first-email.label: Send your first email
send-first-email.description: Deliver a message through Sentroy Mail.

create-template.label: Create an email template
create-template.description: Design a reusable template in Mail.

create-bucket.label: Create a bucket
create-bucket.description: Spin up your first storage bucket.

upload-first-file.label: Upload your first file
upload-first-file.description: Add a file or image to a bucket.

connect-number.label: Connect a WhatsApp number
connect-number.description: Scan the QR code to link a number.

send-first-message.label: Send your first WhatsApp message
send-first-message.description: Message a contact or audience from Santral.

connect-workspace.label: Connect your Linear workspace
connect-workspace.description: Add your Linear API key in settings.

first-request.label: Receive your first request
first-request.description: Get a request into the panel via Telegram or the form.

create-oauth-client.label: Create an OAuth client
create-oauth-client.description: Enable "Sign in with Sentroy" for your app.

create-auth-project.label: Create an Auth project
create-auth-project.description: Host your own end-user pool with Sentroy Auth.

first-project.label: Create a Studio project
first-project.description: Start your first project in Sentroy Studio.

menubar.title: Your workspace
menubar.body: This is the menu bar. Click your company to switch workspaces, view your profile and activity feed, and reach settings.

dock.title: The dock
dock.body: Open your apps from the dock — Mail, Storage, Auth and more. Right-click an app to pin, unpin or open it in a new tab.

windows.title: Apps open as windows
windows.body: Apps run in draggable, resizable windows right here on the desktop — just like a real OS. Idle windows suspend automatically.

widgets.title: Desktop widgets
widgets.body: Right-click the desktop to add widgets, refresh them or change your wallpaper. Widgets stay on your desktop, below your windows.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.body: Track your onboarding progress here. Complete steps as you explore Sentroy — click for the full checklist.
